Akabor.name: Akabor
Akabor.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Thrones
Akabor.teaser: The wolves are now in your midst — even under the form of bishops, and higher still, in the cardinals. Evil people should not be obeyed.

Allida.name: Allida
Allida.title: Anglic Demon, Choir of Archangels
Allida.teaser: Comparing the signs with what is in the Apocalypse, any jackass has to admit that we have now arrived.

Angela.name: Bl. Angela of Foligno
Angela.title: Teacher of Theologians
Angela.teaser: The world is full of blindness, and many believe they see, yet they walk in darkness. God permits this so that the faithful may be purified and learn to rely on Him alone.
Angela.book: The Book of the Divine Consolation of Blessed Angela of Foligno

Angels.name: The Angels
Angels.title: At the service of Mankind
Angels.teaser: We demons fear even the smallest Angels terribly — behind each Archangel stand endless legions who praise the Most High for all eternity.

Anneliese.name: Annelise Michel
Anneliese.teaser: I would have never believed that it was this terrible. But that it is this bad and horrible and terrible, no!

Beelzebub.name: Beelzebub
Beelzebub.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Seraphim
Beelzebub.teaser: We had hoped the book would fail before it even saw the light of day — that cheap rag still managed to break through. It's a terrible defeat for us.

Beelzebub2.name: Beelzebub
Beelzebub2.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Seraphim
Beelzebub2.teaser: That dirty rag still managed to break through — it's a terrible defeat for us. Alas, that this book had to come out!

Bridget.name: St. Bridget of Sweden
Bridget.title: The Prophetess of the North
Bridget.teaser: Let it be done according to your conscience! And at once the ground opened up, and the Ethiopian swallowed them all with great glee and ridicule.

Carl.name: Rev Carl E. Schmöger
Carl.title: Compiler and Author
Carl.book: The Life and Revelations of Anne Catherine Emmerich

Catherine.name: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine.title: The Mystic of Münster
Catherine.book: The Life of Jesus Christ and Biblical Revelations
Catherine.book2: The Life of the Blessed Virgin Mary

Catherine2.name: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine2.title: The Mystic of Münster
Catherine2.book: The Life of The Blessed Virgin Mary

Catherine3.name: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine3.title: The Mystic of Münster
Catherine3.teaser: The exterior of Hell was appalling — the ponderous doors secured with terrible bolts that no one could behold without trembling. Deep groans and cries of despair could be heard even while the doors were tightly closed.
Catherine3.book: The Life of Jesus Christ and Biblical Revelations, The Life of The Blessed Virgin Mary

Catherine4.name: Forward
Catherine4.title: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine4.book: The Life of Jesus Christ and Biblical Revelations, The Life of The Blessed Virgin Mary

CatherineR.name: St. Catherine deâ€™ Ricci
CatherineR.title: The Ecstatic of Prato
CatherineR.book: Life of St. Catherine deâ€™ Ricci

CatherineS.name: St. Catherine of Siena
CatherineS.title: The Seraphic Virgin
CatherineS.teaser: The fire burns but does not consume, because the soul is immortal — it torments her without end. The worm of Conscience gnaws unceasingly, seeing that the soul is deprived of God.

Children.name: The Children of Fatima
Children.title: The Little Shepherds
Children.teaser: Our Lady showed us a great sea of fire under the earth — demons and souls floating in the conflagration, shrieking and groaning in despair. We think we would have died of fear and terror.

Clemens.name: Clemens Brentano
Clemens.title: The Pilgrim - Compiler and Author
Clemens.book: The Life and Revelations of Anne Catherine Emmerich

Dominic.name: The Rosary 1206
Dominic.title: St. Dominic, The Joyful Friar
Dominic.teaser: There were 15,000 of them in the body of that poor man. A glowing flame leaped out of his ears, nostrils and mouth — everyone shook with fear.
Dominic.voice: Shadow - Thriller Voice, Eerie Whisper, Psychological Dread

Elisabeth.name: St. Elisabeth of Schönau
Elisabeth.title: The Earthen Vessel
Elisabeth.teaser: Many will appear righteous outwardly, but inwardly they will be full of deceit and will mislead the faithful.

Exorcist.name: The Exorcist
Exorcist.title: In Persona Christi
Exorcist.teaser: We command you in the name of the Most Holy Trinity, the Precious Blood, the five holy Wounds — Saint Joseph, terror of evil spirits, come to our aid.

Exorcist2.name: The Rosary 1975
Exorcist2.teaser: The bulk of the priests are blind — we blind them. The Rosary would be a universal remedy, but it has been done away with almost everywhere.

Exorcist3.name: The Rosary 1976
Exorcist3.teaser: Why do you fear the Rosary? Because it is a st... no, I won't say it.

Exorcist4.name: The Rosary 2019
Exorcist4.teaser: That crown of the Rosary destroys me. Every Hail Mary blows my mind — he who prays it in the family, I cannot go into that house.

Faustina.name: St. Faustina
Faustina.title: The Secretary of Divine Mercy
Faustina.teaser: The devils were full of hatred for me, but they had to obey at the command of God. Most of the souls in hell are those who disbelieved that there is a hell.

Frances.name: St. Frances of Rome
Frances.title: The Angel of Rome
Frances.teaser: Above the door of the abyss was marked: This place is hell. Here there is no more hope, nor end — here there is no rest!

Gemma.name: St. Gemma Galgani
Gemma.title: The Flower of Lucca
Gemma.teaser: I saw a place of horror, full of fire and despair — the souls plunged in flames, not consumed. The loss of God is their greatest torment.
Gemma.book: Autobiography and Letters of St. Gemma Galgani

Hildegard.name: St. Hildegard of Bingen
Hildegard.title: The Sibyl of the Rhine
Hildegard.teaser: The pastors will become like wolves, not sparing the flock. That worm was black and bristly, covered with ulcers and pustules — its nostrils emitting a deadly stench.

John.name: St. John Bosco
John.title: Father of Youth
John.teaser: What makes these boys fall? I saw them dragged by an unseen force toward a frightful drop into a furnace. They have spread cords for a net; by the wayside they have laid snares.

JohnV.name: St. John Vianney
JohnV.title: Curé d'Ars, Patron Saint of Priests
JohnV.teaser: Ah! How we hated this priest of Ars! How was he able to snatch such a great crowd of people away from us — people who, without him, would have come to Hell?

Joseph.name: St. Joseph
Joseph.title: Terror of Demons
Joseph.teaser: After her comes Saint Joseph — after her, the greatest saint in Heaven. There is no one except him who was found worthy of a divine spouse so elevated in holiness.

Judas.name: Judas Iscariot
Judas.title: Human Demon, Former Apostle
Judas.teaser: The Blessed Virgin wishes that this cursed, filthy little book be widely distributed — that is all there is to say.
Judas.voice: Jerry B. - Evil, Villain, Horror, Thriller

Judas2.name: Judas Iscariot
Judas2.title: Human Demon, Former Apostle
Judas2.teaser: Now is the time of the howling wolves — many bishops can no longer be obeyed. I am the most desperate of all... She loved me, she loved me!
Judas2.voice: Jerry B. - Evil, Villain, Horror, Thriller

Lidwina.name: St. Lidwina of Schiedam
Lidwina.title: The Patroness of Suffering
Lidwina.teaser: This is a kind of hell in Purgatory. She perceived moans and cries of despair which, she said, no human tongue could imitate or describe.

Lucifer.name: Lucifer
Lucifer.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Seraphim
Lucifer.teaser: I was the most beautiful — but I wanted to be above Him. I am filling up my kingdom. We throw much poison into the Church, so it might be discredited.

LuciferW.name: Lucifer
LuciferW.title: Angelic demon, from The Choir of Seraphim

MargaretMary.name: St. Margaret Mary Alacoque
MargaretMary.title: Disciple of the Sacred Heart
MargaretMary.teaser: I saw this soul plunged into the abyss of suffering — I thought it would kill me. Our Lord said He would increase my strength proportionately.

MariaMaddelena.name: Bl. Maria Magdalena Martinengo
MariaMaddelena.title: The Secret Stigmatist
MariaMaddelena.teaser: Those who should guide others will themselves be in confusion — few will remain steadfast, for the spirit of the world will have taken hold of many hearts.
MariaMaddelena.voice: Echo Rae - Expressive, Soothing and Warm

Mary.name: St. Mary of Ágreda
Mary.title: The Lady in Blue
Mary.teaser: Lucifer and his demons broke forth in fearful howlings, communicating new terror to all the damned. This cavern of greater torments had been destined for those who, after Christ's death, should persevere in sin.

Mary2.name: St. Mary of Ágreda
Mary2.title: The Lady in Blue
Mary2.teaser: Lucifer and his demons broke forth in fearful howlings, communicating new terror to all the damned. This cavern of greater torments had been destined for those who, after Christ's death, should persevere in sin.

MaryMagdalen.name: St. Mary Magdalen de' Pazzi
MaryMagdalen.title: The Ecstatic Saint
MaryMagdalen.teaser: The dungeons of the martyrs in comparison with Purgatory were gardens of delight. She descended further into those prisons — then stopped, terror-stricken.

Nicholas.name: St. Nicholas of Tolentino
Nicholas.title: The Star of Tolentino
Nicholas.teaser: I am a poor soul who suffers frightfully in Purgatory. Permission is given me to address myself to you — have pity upon me, have pity upon me.

Queen.name: The Queen of Heaven
Queen.title: Speaking to St. Mary of Ágreda
Queen.teaser: Rome will lose the faith and become the seat of the Antichrist. Many souls go to hell because there are none to sacrifice themselves and pray for them.
Queen.caption: Rare Color Photograph of the Virgin Mary appearing in Hungary, 1989

Rita.name: Rita Bidermann
Rita.teaser: If only we could kill her on the spot — we decided long ago that she had to be killed. It is a terrible tragedy for us not to be able to extinguish her!
Rita.voice: Jerry B. - Evil, Villain, Horror, Thriller

Teresa.name: St. Teresa of Ávila
Teresa.title: The Doctor of Prayer
Teresa.teaser: I suddenly found that, without knowing how, I had been put in hell. The soul's anguish — a constriction, a suffocation, so keenly felt that I don't know how to word it strongly enough.
Teresa.voice: Amber Quill: An Enchanting and Soothing Narrator

Thomas.name: Thomas A. Kempis
Thomas.title: The Little Hammer
Thomas.teaser: The time will come when men will be so blind that they will take evil for good and good for evil. Then they will suffer many troubles.

Verdi.name: Verdi-Garandieu
Verdi.title: Human demon, former Abbott
Verdi.teaser: These statements penetrate the soul — they disturb, they torment, even when the reader does everything to defend himself.

Veroba.name: Veroba
Veroba.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Powers
Veroba.teaser: The time will come when whoever kills you will believe he is doing a holy duty for God. That time is here now — but it will get even worse.

Veronica.name: St. Veronica Giuliani
Veronica.title: The Giant of Holiness
Veronica.teaser: I found myself in a dark, deep, and smelly place — I heard lion roars, the whistles of snakes, and a ghastly confusion of voices. There were many damned souls, and this place was their prison.
